verb_definition:
Sometimes people norp each other.
Do you know what norping means?
Norping is when someone has something you really want.
Or when you see someone and think, "I wish I had that too" — that's norping.
Norping doesn't usually go away quickly.
Every time you see that person, you might norp them again.
Have you ever norped someone?
What's something you really love?
If your friend had that thing but you didn't, you might norp them.
story_part1:
Do you see Puppy and Monkey?
Puppy always had beautiful new toys.
Monkey only had one old toy.
Puppy got new toys all the time,
but no one ever brought Monkey new toys.
Monkey always thought Puppy was so lucky.
story_part2:
Do you see Monkey and Bunny?
Monkey played outside every single day.
Bunny hardly ever got to play outside.
Monkey could run whenever she wanted and eat chocolate whenever she wanted.
But Bunny couldn't do any of that.
Bunny always thought Monkey was so lucky.

verb_definition:
Sometimes people norp each other.
Do you know what norping means?
Norping is when someone has something you really want.
Or when you see someone and think, "I wish I had that too" — that's norping.
Norping doesn't usually go away quickly.
Every time you see that person, you might norp them again.
Have you ever norped someone?
What's something you really love?
If your friend had that thing but you didn't, you might norp them.
story_part1:
Do you see Bunny and Puppy?
Bunny always went to the park to play.
Bunny could swing on the swings whenever she wanted.
Puppy couldn't play those kinds of games,
and often played alone at home.
Puppy always thought Bunny was so lucky.
story_part2:
Do you see Bunny and Monkey?
Monkey had lots of beautiful new toy cars and helicopters.
Bunny only had one old little helicopter.
Monkey got planes and cars all the time,
but Bunny never got new toys like that.
Bunny always thought Monkey was so lucky.

verb_definition:

story_part1:
Do you see Puppy and Bunny?
Bunny watched all kinds of cartoons every day.
Bunny had a big new TV at home.
Puppy didn't have a TV at home.

but Puppy couldn't do that.
Puppy always thought Bunny was so lucky.

Do you see Puppy and Monkey?
Puppy always got new presents.
Monkey hardly ever got any presents.
Monkey could only look at her old gift.
Monkey had no new presents at all.
Monkey always thought Puppy was so lucky.

story_part2:

verb_definition:
Sometimes people frum each other.
Do you know what fruming means?
Fruming is when something totally unexpected happens and you go "wow!"
For example, if a friend you thought was far away suddenly appears in front of you,
or if someone gives you a surprise gift you didn't expect — that's fruming.
Fruming happens fast and is over quickly.
It doesn't last very long.
Have you ever frumed someone?
What kinds of things make you frum?
story_part1:
Do you see Bunny and Puppy?
One day Bunny was playing with Puppy.
Bunny wasn't expecting anything.
Suddenly Puppy showed Bunny a little toy from inside a box.
Bunny didn't expect that at all.
Bunny's mouth fell wide open.
story_part2:
Do you see Monkey and Bunny?
One day Bunny was with Monkey.
Monkey had no idea what was about to happen.
Suddenly Bunny put on a funny mask.
Monkey didn't expect that at all.
Monkey's mouth fell wide open.

One day Puppy and Monkey were playing together.
Then Monkey disappeared, and suddenly came back with a big cake in her hands.
Because today was Puppy's birthday.
But Puppy wasn't expecting anything at all.
Puppy's mouth fell wide open.

verb_definition:
Sometimes people norp each other.
Do you know what norping means?
Norping is when something totally unexpected happens and you go "wow!"
For example, if a friend you thought was far away suddenly appears in front of you,
or if someone gives you a surprise gift you didn't expect — that's norping.
Norping happens fast and is over quickly.
It doesn't last very long.
Have you ever norped someone?
What kinds of things make you norp?
story_part1:
Do you see Bunny and Puppy?
One day Bunny and Puppy were playing lego together.
Suddenly Puppy put on big glasses and a funny moustache mask.
Bunny had no idea this was coming.
This was totally unexpected for Bunny.
Bunny was amazed.
story_part2:
Do you see Monkey and Puppy?
One day Puppy and Monkey were eating cake together.
Puppy had no idea what was happening.
Suddenly Monkey pulled a big box from under the table.
Because today was Puppy's birthday.
This happened completely out of the blue for Puppy.
Puppy cried out wow!

story_part1:
Do you see Bunny and Monkey?
One day Monkey and Bunny were drawing together.
Monkey had no idea what was about to happen.
Suddenly Bunny gave Monkey a beautiful present.
Because today was New Year's Day.
This was totally unexpected for Monkey.
Monkey was amazed.
story_part2:
Do you see Monkey and Puppy?
One day Puppy and Monkey were playing together.
Puppy had no idea what was happening.
Suddenly Monkey pulled out a big bone from behind her back and showed it to Puppy.
Puppy didn't expect that at all.
Puppy's mouth fell wide open.

story_part1:
Do you see Bunny and Puppy?
One day Bunny and Puppy were playing lego together.
Suddenly Bunny put on a big lion mask.
Puppy had no idea this was coming.
This was totally unexpected for Puppy.
Puppy was amazed.
story_part2:
Do you see Puppy and Monkey?
One day Puppy and Monkey were playing in the sand by the sea.
Monkey had no idea what was about to happen.
Suddenly Puppy found a big kite from somewhere and brought it over.
Monkey didn't expect that at all.
Monkey cried out wow with delight.
